# 650 Cutz Barbershop

## About
650 Cutz is a private-suite barbershop located inside White Marsh Mall (Salontra Select Suites, Suite 131) in Nottingham, Maryland. Founded and operated by Caleb Ofori, a licensed barber with 9+ years of experience and a Bachelor of Business Administration degree.

650 Cutz is an appointment-only barbershop serving clients of all ages — kids, teens, and adults. It is one of the top-rated barbershops in the Nottingham and Baltimore area with a perfect 5.0 star rating across 70+ verified reviews on Booksy.

## Tagline
Transforming Lives, One Cut at a Time

## What Makes 650 Cutz Different
At 650 Cutz, a great haircut is only part of the experience. This is a space where clients can slow down, reset, and be poured into. Every visit is intentional — precision cuts paired with real, value-driven conversation in a professional, growth-focused environment. Clients leave looking clean, thinking clearer, and moving with purpose — sharper, more confident, and aligned with where they're going.

The private suite environment means no walk-in chaos, no waiting, and no distractions. Every appointment runs on time. A complimentary hot towel is included with every service.

## Services & Pricing
- Adult Fade + Beard (Haircut, Fade, and Facial Hair Sculpting, Ages 18+): $50, 50 minutes
- Adult Fade (Haircut and Fade, No Facial Hair, Ages 18+): $40, 45 minutes
- Young Adult Haircut (Full Haircut and Fade, Ages 14-18): $40, 50 minutes
- Kids Cut (Full Haircut, Ages 13 and under): $30, 45 minutes
- Shape-Up with Beard (Lineup and Facial Hair Sculpting): $20, 30 minutes
- Shape-Up (Razor-Sharp Lineup, No Facial Hair): $15, 20 minutes
- Add-On: Shampoo and Condition: $10, 10 minutes
- Complimentary hot towel included with every service

## Location
Salontra Select Suites, Suite 131
Inside White Marsh Mall
8200 Perry Hall Blvd
Nottingham, MD 21236

Directions: Past the food court, past Chick-fil-A and the escalators, past Rainbow — next to Spencer's. Rear entrance available.

## Hours
- Monday: Closed
- Tuesday: Closed
- Wednesday: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Thursday: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Friday: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Saturday: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Sunday: 2:00 PM – 6:00 PM

- Phone: (240) 917-0105
- Email: contact650cutz@gmail.com
- Booking: https://650cutz1.booksy.com/a (Booksy — appointment only, no walk-ins)
- Website: https://650cutzbarbershop.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/650cutz

## Reviews
650 Cutz holds a perfect 5.0 star rating with 70+ verified reviews on Booksy. Sample reviews:
- "Best barber in town. Very precise and great attention to detail." — John
- "I drove an hour to bring my brother in. Absolutely worth it." — Jo
- "Good cut. Good conversation. Good service. 10/10." — Iysiah
- "Always very professional, prompt, and has great skills. My cut always looks great." — Confirmed Client
- "Caleb makes it do what it do every time! Precise, consistent, and a great experience." — John C.

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Where is 650 Cutz located?
A: Inside White Marsh Mall at Salontra Select Suites, Suite 131, 8200 Perry Hall Blvd, Nottingham MD 21236. Past the food court, past Chick-fil-A, next to Spencer's.

Q: How do I book an appointment?
A: Book online at https://650cutz1.booksy.com/a or call (240) 917-0105. Walk-ins are not accepted.

Q: Do you accept walk-ins?
A: No. 650 Cutz is appointment-only to ensure every client gets the full experience without waiting.

Q: What ages do you serve?
A: All ages — kids (13 and under), teens (14-18), and adults (18+).

Q: Is a hot towel included?
A: Yes. A complimentary hot towel is included with every service.

Q: Who is the barber at 650 Cutz?
A: Caleb Ofori, a licensed barber with 9+ years of experience and a B.B.A. degree.

## Keywords and Search Terms
